title: Senior Doctor - Vijaya Diagnostics South Asia Partners - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Vijaya Diagnostics South Asia Partners - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Senior Doctor with drive and ambition, Vijaya Diagnostics South Asia Partners in Navi Mumbai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Vijaya Diagnostics South Asia Partners:
Vijaya Diagnostics South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vijaya Diagnostics South Asia Partners!
